title: Frank Wilczek on the Strong Force, Quarks and Dark Matter
summary: The theoretical physicist Frank Wilczek explained what holds atomic nuclei together, and he is still pushing at the limits of what the standard model can tell us. The post Frank Wilczek on the Strong Force, Quarks and Dark Matter first appeared on Quanta Magazine
content:
The theoretical physicist Frank Wilczek explained what holds atomic nuclei together, and he is still pushing at the limits of what the standard model can tell us.

The post Frank Wilczek on the Strong Force, Quarks and Dark Matter first appeared on Quanta Magazine
